content.speakerText: What are the steps to register for the program?
content.speakerTextCn: 报名这个项目的步骤是什么？
expectedAnswers: First, fill out the online form. Then, confirm your courses. Finally, submit your documents by Friday.
You need to choose your courses, complete the application, and make sure it’s done before the deadline.
Step one: log in to the portal. Step two: select your classes. Step three: click submit. Deadline is Friday!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：清晰列出至少两个报名步骤
语言准确性：使用顺序连接词（first, then, finally）或流程表达
表达自然度：包含场景关键词（register, confirm, deadline, submit）且语调自然

content.scenarioHint: 你打算参加一个短期语言课程，想了解报名的具体步骤和截止日期，以免错过机会。
content.speakerText: Could you tell me how to sign up for the course and when the deadline is?
content.speakerTextCn: 你能告诉我怎么报名这个课程，以及截止日期是什么时候吗？
expectedAnswers: You need to create an account on our portal, upload your ID, and select your class. Deadline is next Monday at midnight.
Just fill out the online form and confirm your email — registrations close on the 15th, no exceptions.
First, pay the enrollment fee if you’re not a current student, then submit your application. Deadline’s Friday, 11:59 PM.
Go to the website, click ‘Enroll’, and complete the checklist. We stop accepting applications at 6 PM on the 20th.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：明确询问了报名步骤和截止日期两个关键信息
语言准确性：语法正确，时态和用词符合口语习惯
表达自然度：使用了自然的口语表达，如‘just’, ‘go to’, ‘no exceptions’等
关键词覆盖：包含‘sign up’, ‘deadline’, ‘register’, ‘application’等场景关键词

content.scenarioHint: 你对一个海外交换项目感兴趣，想确认是否需要推荐信、成绩单等材料，以及最后提交申请的期限。
content.speakerText: What documents do I need to submit when applying, and what’s the final date to apply?
content.speakerTextCn: 申请时需要提交哪些材料？最终申请截止日期是什么时候？
expectedAnswers: You’ll need your transcript, a personal statement, and one letter of recommendation. Deadline’s April 30th — no late submissions.
Just your passport copy and completed form. Applications close at the end of this month, so don’t wait!
Submit your CV, academic records, and proof of language proficiency. The system shuts down on May 10th at 11:59 PM.
No recommendation letters needed for this program — just your application form and photo. Deadline’s next Friday, no extensions.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：清晰询问了所需材料和最终截止日期
语言准确性：使用了正确的动词搭配（submit, need, close）和时间表达
表达自然度：符合真实咨询场景中的口语节奏，如‘so don’t wait!’、‘no extensions’
关键词覆盖：包含‘documents’, ‘submit’, ‘apply’, ‘deadline’, ‘final date’等核心词汇
